story.soThat: **workflows can be securely distributed, installed, and verified in the marketplace**.

tasks.task: Task 3: Create JSON schema for manifest validation
Task 4: Add IPC handlers for packaging operations
Task 5: Write unit tests for WorkflowPackagingService
Task 6: Write integration tests for packaging workflow
Task 8: Create test fixtures for workflow packages

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-4.1**: Workflow directory correctly packaged into .wfpkg bundle (ZIP format)
**AC-4.2**: Manifest.json validated against JSON schema (required fields, version format)
**AC-4.3**: .wfpkg file correctly compressed (can be extracted with standard zip tools)
**AC-4.4**: SHA-256 hash generated for package integrity
**AC-4.5**: Package extraction works (round-trip: directory → package → extract)

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: **AC-4.1**: Workflow directory correctly packaged into .wfpkg bundle (ZIP format...
Test: **AC-4.2**: Manifest.json validated against JSON schema (required fields, versio...
Test: **AC-4.3**: .wfpkg file correctly compressed (can be extracted with standard zip...
Test: **AC-4.4**: SHA-256 hash generated for package integrity...
Test: **AC-4.5**: Package extraction works (round-trip: directory → package → extract)...
